engagement.workingTitle: Market Research & Analytics commercial strategy engagement
engagement.sourceRole: Director/Senior Director, Market Research & Analytics - Part-Time Contractor
engagement.sourceUse: Use the posting as source material to infer the commercial business problem, not as a candidate application brief.

commercialHypothesis.problemStatement: Syneos Health likely needs a more scalable, insight-driven market research and analytics operating model to support pharmaceutical and biotech client strategy, customer intelligence, segmentation, performance measurement, and commercial decision-making.
whyNow: The role asks for integration of qualitative, quantitative, secondary, syndicated, and advanced analytics inputs.
The role requires executive-ready insights, KPI dashboards, and stakeholder alignment.
Syneos publicly emphasizes AI-driven performance and predictive commercial solutions.

successCriteria: Stakeholders can see the commercial problem clearly.
The operating model is specific enough to execute.
The measurement framework is practical for executive use.
The roadmap separates immediate discovery from 12-month maturity work.
assumptions: The role posting is a proxy for a broader commercial need, not just a staffing gap.
Syneos is likely looking for repeatable insight generation across multiple client contexts.
The underlying problem is more about scaling decision quality than producing more isolated research.
openQuestions: Which internal stakeholders own the insight operating model today?
How are research, analytics, and executive reporting currently organized?
Which client segments most need this capability first?
